name: receipts
description: Agents need receipts: a verification layer that re-proves an AI fix before you trust it. The Seven Gates standard + a Claude Code adapter + verification memory.

plugins.name: receipts
plugins.description: The Seven Gates agent adapter: teaches your agent to produce receipts (reproduce-first, verify-by-value, pin the right surface, sweep the twins) so its fixes are verifiable - plus a Stop-hook verification backstop and cross-loop verification memory.
